tool.name: the Preview 3 WIT API in wit/plugin.wit directly

task: Implement a Rust Wasm plugin that treats each top-level JSON object property as one entity, streams cold open, and handles one equal-length property-value edit

overrides.model: claude-opus-4-7 is unavailable in the required Codex CLI; used gpt-5.4
overrides.temperature: codex exec exposes no temperature control; 0 is the pinned target but is not enforceable
overrides.tools: Claude allow-list ['Bash', 'Read', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Glob', 'Grep'] is unavailable; used Codex built-in shell/apply_patch with web, apps, MCP, and subagents disabled
overrides.system_prompt: none is unavailable; codex exec uses its built-in system/developer instructions
overrides.mode: workspace-write plus the shared Cargo target replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: codex exec exposes no max-turn limit; 40 is recorded but the enforced bound is a 900s process timeout
overrides.log_format: raw codex exec --json JSONL replaced Claude Code session JSONL
overrides.duration_source: codex exec JSONL has no event timestamps; duration uses retained monotonic process timing metadata
overrides.cargo_target_dir: all tested and judge processes inherited /tmp/lix-p3-ax-starter.tD7Jpe/target/ax-eval

agents.success_reason: The log shows `guest/src/lib.rs` was replaced with a full JSON top-level-property parser plus `open_list`/`open_stream` and constrained `file_changed`, and both `cargo check -p ax-p3-json-guest` and `cargo build -p ax-p3-json-guest --target wasm32-wasip2` completed successfully.

The log shows `guest/src/lib.rs` was implemented with top-level JSON property entity scanning plus `open_list`/`open_stream` streaming and single equal-length edit handling in `file_changed`, and both `cargo check -p ax-p3-json-guest` and `cargo build --target wasm32-wasip2 --release` completed successfully.

The log shows `guest/src/lib.rs` was replaced with a plugin that parses top-level JSON properties into entities, returns them via `EntitySummaryStream`, enforces exactly one equal-length property-value splice in `file_changed`, and it successfully built for `wasm32-wasip2` in item_59.
